author: JB
text: **Two honest residuals:** the ticker body and perception/telemetry overlay routing remain inline in `main.ts` (straight wiring, no branching logic — extractable later if you want the full split), and I verified via unit tests + type-check + production build but did **not** launch the Electron app. I'd recommend a quick `npm run dev` smoke test (creatures render, click-select, plant painting, G/P/F overlays in dev) before merging — and ideally a 200k benchmark run to measure the renderer-side win.

author: JB
text: so npm run dev:release didn't open dev-ui !? why?

author: JB
text: I also updated the AGENTS.md command table to state this explicitly, and noted in my memory that `dev:release` must keep the dev-ui window so this doesn't regress again. If you'd rather `dev` also open dev-ui (i.e., revert to the old always-on behavior and drop the gating entirely), that's a two-line change — say the word.

author: JB
text: Trial spawning from the dev-ui should work now — no rebuild needed, just restart `npm run dev:release` (the validator runs in the Electron main process).

author: JB
